NAME: The Japan COVID-19 Task Force study
MANUAL_CITATION: Wang, Q. S., Hasegawa, T., Namkoong, H., Saiki, R., Edahiro, R., Sonehara, K., ... & Japan COVID-19 Task Force. (2024). Statistically and functionally fine-mapped blood eQTLs and pQTLs from 1,405 humans reveal distinct regulation patterns and disease relevance. Nature genetics, 56(10), 2054-2067.
DESCRIPTION: Multi-institution Japanese consortium formed during the COVID-19 pandemic; contributes multi-omics and GWAS-related data surfaced through resources such as the Japan Omics Browser.
